content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — Push entitlement (aps-environment=production, DealAlerts.entitlements:3) is paired with hardcoded hourly repeating notifications (NotificationScheduler.swift: `UNTimeIntervalNotificationTrigger(timeInterval: 3600, repeats: true)`) and metadata explicitly advertising "EVERY HOUR" and "unlimited notifications" (description.txt).
Pierre: Apple's 4.5.4 push guidelines require notifications to be user-initiated and not used for unsolicited advertising or spam-like repetition; automatically scheduling hourly promotional pushes with no user opt-in per-alert is a classic rejection pattern. Fix by letting users configure frequency/opt-in explicitly, remove "EVERY HOUR"/"unlimited" marketing language, and consider server-triggered relevant deal alerts instead of a blind hourly timer.
